item.title: Circuit Fault Diagnosis Using Simulation and Bayesian Inference
HTML Basics
item.description: Table of contents Introduction Basics Elements Attributes Headings Paragraph Styles Text Formatting Quotation Comments Text Formatting Colors Styling HTML with CSS Introduction The notes were taken based on the tutorial from https://www.w3schools.com/html/default.asp, and the notes could be used for a quick lookup about the usage of the HTML commands. HTML stands for Hyper Text Markup Language.

item.title: RSpice: A Package for Using ngspice from R
Seasonal Warranty Prediction Based on Recurrent Event Data
item.description: The manuscript was submitted to Technometrics in November, 2018.

item.title: SQL Basics
item.description: Basic Concepts Database: A container (usually a file or a set of files) to store organized data. Table: A structured list of data of a specific type. Every table in the database has a unique name that identifies it. Schema: Information about database and table layout and properties. For example, information that how data is stored in them, what data is stored , how it’s broken up etc. Primary Keys: A column(or a set of columns) whose value uniquely identify every row in a table.
